$comment: EAS Build profiles for Escalas Hospitalares. See docs/operations/mobile-deploy.md.

build.$comment_development: Used for `eas build --profile development` — produces a development client build that connects to the local Metro server. Devs install it once, then run `pnpm start` to point it at any branch.
build.$comment_preview: Internal-distribution builds for testers. iOS goes to TestFlight (up to 100 internal testers, no Apple review). Android produces an APK signed with EAS-managed keystore — install via direct download.
build.$comment_production: Store-bound builds. iOS produces a release build for App Store Connect. Android produces an AAB for Play Store. Bundle ID still provisional — must be replaced with a production-owned domain before submitting to either store.

submit.$comment_production: EAS Submit pipeline — uploads built artifacts to App Store Connect and Play Store. Requires Apple App Store Connect API key and Google Play Service Account JSON configured separately. See docs/operations/mobile-deploy.md.
